allow: PowerShell($src="C:\\Users\\rkilani.CORP\\Downloads\\hmwp-loops-extract"; $dst="C:\\Users\\rkilani.CORP\\Documents\\Claude\\Projects\\HM-WP\\.claude\\skills"; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path $dst | Out-Null; foreach \($s in @\('spec','build','review'\)\) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path "$dst\\$s" | Out-Null; Copy-Item "$src\\$s\\SKILL.md" "$dst\\$s\\SKILL.md" -Force }; Get-ChildItem $dst -Recurse | Select-Object FullName)

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== recent Downloads \(last 15, newest first\) ==="; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Users\\rkilani.CORP\\Downloads" -File | Sort-Object LastWriteTime -Descending | Select-Object -First 15 Name, LastWriteTime, Length | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "=== current branch ==="; $d="C:\\Users\\rkilani.CORP\\Documents\\Claude\\Projects\\HM-WP"; git -C $d branch --show-current; Write-Output "=== specs/ dir ==="; if\(Test-Path "$d\\specs"\){ Get-ChildItem "$d\\specs" } else { Write-Output "specs/ does not exist yet" })
